name: Frozen Christmas Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast blanched almonds and chop the maraschino cherries.
2. Combine the syrups, raisins, and lemon zest in a bowl.
3. Heat to boiling, then add the crushed pineapple and marshmallows. Stir until dissolved.
4. Cool mixture, then stir in the chopped cherries, toasted almonds, lemon juice, and rum flavoring.
5. Beat egg whites and salt until foamy. Gradually add sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
6. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the main batter.
7. Add cream and mix well.
8. Spoon the mixture into a refrigerator tray and freeze until firm.
Makes 8 servings.
